```dockerfile
# Wed, 17 Sep 2025 00:23:53 GMT
COPY /rootfs/ / # buildkit
# Wed, 17 Sep 2025 00:23:53 GMT
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
# Wed, 17 Sep 2025 00:23:53 GMT
ARG version=11.0.28.6-1
# Wed, 17 Sep 2025 00:23:53 GMT
# ARGS: version=11.0.28.6-1
